title: Smoky Thai Peas Grill
description: A smoky and velvety monsoon-style Thai dish featuring grilled peas that is both delightful and healthy for all to enjoy.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix the oil with the smoked paprika and lime juice. Stir well.
Place frozen peas in a large zip-top plastic bag.
Drizzle the mixture over the peas and toss gently until all peas are coated.
Pour the coated peas into your preheated grill basket or directly onto the grill grates (make sure not to overcrowd).
Grill for about 4-5 minutes, turning occasionally, until the peas have a nice char on them and they're heated through. They should be golden brown.
Serve immediately as a side dish or over quinoa or rice for an extra meal.
